1	# Common Annotation Errors
2	
3	这个文件收集 annotation 阶段最常见、最值得提前规避的错误。
4	
5	每个案例都保持同一结构：
6	
7	1. 错误的 Assertion / Invariant
8	2. 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
9	3. 正确的 Assertion / Invariant
10	
11	## 1. 漏掉 `@pre` 桥
12	
13	### 错误的 Assertion
14	
15	```c
16	/*@ Assert
17	    exists parent1 rank1,
18	      0 <= rx && rx < n &&
19	      0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
20	      0 <= y && y < n &&
21	      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent1, rank1), applyf(uf_union_after_find_x(y), rx), X) &&
22	      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent1) *
23	      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
24	*/
25	```
26	
27	### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
28	
29	```coq
30	... 0 <= n /\ n < INT_MAX /\ 0 <= y /\ y < n /\
31	IntArray.full parent n parent1 * IntArray.full rank n rank1
32	|--
33	... 0 <= n_pre /\ n_pre < INT_MAX /\ 0 <= y_pre /\ y_pre < n_pre /\
34	IntArray.full parent_pre n_pre parent_out * IntArray.full rank_pre n_pre rank_out
35	```
36	
37	左边只有当前 `n / parent / rank / x / y`，右边要的是
38	`n_pre / parent_pre / rank_pre / x_pre / y_pre`，中间没有桥。
39	
40	### 正确的 Assertion
41	
42	```c
43	/*@ Assert
44	    exists parent1 rank1,
45	      n == n@pre &&
46	      parent == parent@pre &&
47	      rank == rank@pre &&
48	      x == x@pre &&
49	      y == y@pre &&
50	      0 <= rx && rx < n &&
51	      0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
52	      0 <= y && y < n &&
53	      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent1, rank1), applyf(uf_union_after_find_x(y), rx), X) &&
54	      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent1) *
55	      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
56	*/
57	```
58	
59	## 2. 读了数组元素，但没把局部变量和数组值绑定起来
60	
61	### 错误的 Assertion
62	
63	```c
64	/*@ Assert
65	    rx_rank == rank_out[rx] &&
66	    rx != ry &&
67	    n == n@pre &&
68	    parent == parent@pre &&
69	    rank == rank@pre &&
70	    x == x@pre &&
71	    y == y@pre &&
72	    0 <= rx && rx < n &&
73	    0 <= ry && ry < n &&
74	    0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
75	    safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent_out, rank_out), uf_union_after_ry_rank(rx, ry, rx_rank, ry_rank), X) &&
76	    IntArray::full(parent, n, parent_out) *
77	    IntArray::full(rank, n, rank_out)
78	*/
79	```
80	
81	这里错在少了：
82	
83	```c
84	ry_rank == rank_out[ry]
85	```
86	
87	### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
88	
89	```coq
90	safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent3, rank_out), bump_rank(ry), X)
91	&& IntArray.full(rank, n, rank_out)
92	|--
93	exists rank3,
94	  rank3 = replace_Znth(ry, ry_rank + 1, rank_out) /\
95	  safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent3, rank3), return(tt), X) /\
96	  IntArray.full(rank, n, rank3)
97	```
98	
99	没有 `ry_rank == rank_out[ry]`，`ry_rank` 只是一个游离整数，不是
100	“数组当前位置读出来的值”。
101	
102	### 正确的 Assertion
103	
104	```c
105	/*@ Assert
106	    ry_rank == rank_out[ry] &&
107	    rx_rank == rank_out[rx] &&
108	    rx != ry &&
109	    n == n@pre &&
110	    parent == parent@pre &&
111	    rank == rank@pre &&
112	    x == x@pre &&
113	    y == y@pre &&
114	    0 <= rx && rx < n &&
115	    0 <= ry && ry < n &&
116	    0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
117	    safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent_out, rank_out), uf_union_after_ry_rank(rx, ry, rx_rank, ry_rank), X) &&
118	    IntArray::full(parent, n, parent_out) *
119	    IntArray::full(rank, n, rank_out)
120	*/
121	```
122	
123	## 3. 用恒真式假装“保变量”
124	
125	### 错误的 Assertion
126	
127	```c
128	/*@ Assert
129	    exists parent2,
130	      parent2 == replace_Znth(x, r, parent1) &&
131	      p == p &&
132	      0 <= r && r < n &&
133	      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent2, rank1), return(r), X) &&
134	      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent2) *
135	      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
136	*/
137	```
138	
139	### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
140	
141	```coq
142	emp |-- &( "p") # Int |-> 0
143	```
144	
145	`p == p` 没有提供任何新信息，只会把当前程序变量 `p` 又读进
146	full assertion，结果后件多出一格局部变量槽位资源。
147	
148	### 正确的 Assertion
149	
150	```c
151	/*@ Assert
152	    exists parent2,
153	      parent2 == replace_Znth(x, r, parent1) &&
154	      n == n@pre &&
155	      parent == parent@pre &&
156	      rank == rank@pre &&
157	      x == x@pre &&
158	      0 <= r && r < n &&
159	      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent2, rank1), return(r), X) &&
160	      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent2) *
161	      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
162	*/
163	```
164	
165	这里关键就是删掉 `p == p`，只保留真正有信息量的关系。
166	
167	## 4. Refinement 分层错误：把 functional correctness 塞进 C 侧 invariant
168	
169	这个错误常见于 refinement case。它未必会立刻表现成一个
170	“少一句纯事实”的局部卡点，但会让 annotation 结构变重、返工成本变高。
171	
172	### 错误的 Invariant
173	
174	下面给出一个坏版 `kmp_rel.c` `constr` 循环不变量：
175	
176	```c
177	/*@ Inv Assert
178	        exists vnext0 l0,
179	            safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X) &&
180	            is_prefix_func(vnext0, sublist(0, i, str)) &&
181	            patn == patn@pre &&
182	            len == n && n < INT_MAX && 1 <= i &&
183	            CharArray::full(patn, n + 1, app(str, cons(0, nil))) *
184	            IntArray::full(vnext, i, vnext0) *
185	            IntArray::full((vnext + i * sizeof(int)), n - i, l0)
186	*/
187	```
188	
189	这里多出来的坏东西是：
190	
191	```c
192	is_prefix_func(vnext0, sublist(0, i, str))
193	```
194	
195	### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
196	
197	```coq
198	... safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from_after(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X)
199	... IntArray.full(vnext, n, l)
200	|--
201	EX vnext1 l1,
202	   safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i + 1, vnext1, j), X)
203	   && is_prefix_func(vnext1, sublist(0, i + 1, str))
204	   && IntArray.full(vnext, i + 1, vnext1)
205	   ** IntArray.full((vnext + (i + 1) * sizeof(int)), n - (i + 1), l1)
206	```
207	
208	这会迫使 C 层 invariant 在每一步都证明 KMP 前缀函数构造的
209	functional correctness。对于 refinement case，这类 functional
210	correctness 应只出现在 `high_level_spec` 中；除 `high_level_spec`
211	外，C 侧 annotation 不应重复出现 monad 已经覆盖的 functional
212	correctness 谓词。
213	
214	### 正确的 Invariant
215	
216	`kmp_rel.c` 里更合理的写法是：
217	
218	```c
219	/*@ Inv Assert
220	        exists vnext0 l0,
221	            safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X) &&
222	            patn == patn@pre &&
223	            len == n && n < INT_MAX && 1 <= i &&
224	            CharArray::full(patn, n + 1, app(str, cons(0, nil))) *
225	            IntArray::full(vnext, i, vnext0) *
226	            IntArray::full((vnext + i * sizeof(int)), n - i, l0)
227	*/
228	```
229	
230	这里 invariant 只维护：
231	
232	- residual `safeExec(...)`
233	- 当前游标 / progress
234	- 内存 shape
235	- 必要的 `@pre` 桥接
236	
237	而最终 functional correctness：
238	
239	```c
240	is_prefix_func(vnext, str)
241	```
242	
243	只出现在 `high_level_spec` 里。除 `high_level_spec` 外，C 侧
244	annotation 不应再次要求证明这一类最终功能语义。
245

file.content:
# Common Annotation Errors

这个文件收集 annotation 阶段最常见、最值得提前规避的错误。

每个案例都保持同一结构：

1. 错误的 Assertion / Invariant
2. 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样
3. 正确的 Assertion / Invariant

## 1. 漏掉 `@pre` 桥

### 错误的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    exists parent1 rank1,
      0 <= rx && rx < n &&
      0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
      0 <= y && y < n &&
      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent1, rank1), applyf(uf_union_after_find_x(y), rx), X) &&
      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent1) *
      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
*/
```

### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样

```coq
... 0 <= n /\ n < INT_MAX /\ 0 <= y /\ y < n /\
IntArray.full parent n parent1 * IntArray.full rank n rank1
|--
... 0 <= n_pre /\ n_pre < INT_MAX /\ 0 <= y_pre /\ y_pre < n_pre /\
IntArray.full parent_pre n_pre parent_out * IntArray.full rank_pre n_pre rank_out
```

左边只有当前 `n / parent / rank / x / y`，右边要的是
`n_pre / parent_pre / rank_pre / x_pre / y_pre`，中间没有桥。

### 正确的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    exists parent1 rank1,
      n == n@pre &&
      parent == parent@pre &&
      rank == rank@pre &&
      x == x@pre &&
      y == y@pre &&
      0 <= rx && rx < n &&
      0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
      0 <= y && y < n &&
      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent1, rank1), applyf(uf_union_after_find_x(y), rx), X) &&
      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent1) *
      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
*/
```

## 2. 读了数组元素，但没把局部变量和数组值绑定起来

### 错误的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    rx_rank == rank_out[rx] &&
    rx != ry &&
    n == n@pre &&
    parent == parent@pre &&
    rank == rank@pre &&
    x == x@pre &&
    y == y@pre &&
    0 <= rx && rx < n &&
    0 <= ry && ry < n &&
    0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
    safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent_out, rank_out), uf_union_after_ry_rank(rx, ry, rx_rank, ry_rank), X) &&
    IntArray::full(parent, n, parent_out) *
    IntArray::full(rank, n, rank_out)
*/
```

这里错在少了：

```c
ry_rank == rank_out[ry]
```

### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样

```coq
safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent3, rank_out), bump_rank(ry), X)
&& IntArray.full(rank, n, rank_out)
|--
exists rank3,
  rank3 = replace_Znth(ry, ry_rank + 1, rank_out) /\
  safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent3, rank3), return(tt), X) /\
  IntArray.full(rank, n, rank3)
```

没有 `ry_rank == rank_out[ry]`，`ry_rank` 只是一个游离整数，不是
“数组当前位置读出来的值”。

### 正确的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    ry_rank == rank_out[ry] &&
    rx_rank == rank_out[rx] &&
    rx != ry &&
    n == n@pre &&
    parent == parent@pre &&
    rank == rank@pre &&
    x == x@pre &&
    y == y@pre &&
    0 <= rx && rx < n &&
    0 <= ry && ry < n &&
    0 <= n && n < INT_MAX &&
    safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent_out, rank_out), uf_union_after_ry_rank(rx, ry, rx_rank, ry_rank), X) &&
    IntArray::full(parent, n, parent_out) *
    IntArray::full(rank, n, rank_out)
*/
```

## 3. 用恒真式假装“保变量”

### 错误的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    exists parent2,
      parent2 == replace_Znth(x, r, parent1) &&
      p == p &&
      0 <= r && r < n &&
      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent2, rank1), return(r), X) &&
      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent2) *
      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
*/
```

### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样

```coq
emp |-- &( "p") # Int |-> 0
```

`p == p` 没有提供任何新信息，只会把当前程序变量 `p` 又读进
full assertion，结果后件多出一格局部变量槽位资源。

### 正确的 Assertion

```c
/*@ Assert
    exists parent2,
      parent2 == replace_Znth(x, r, parent1) &&
      n == n@pre &&
      parent == parent@pre &&
      rank == rank@pre &&
      x == x@pre &&
      0 <= r && r < n &&
      safeExec(state_bridge(n, parent2, rank1), return(r), X) &&
      IntArray::full(parent, n, parent2) *
      IntArray::full(rank, n, rank1)
*/
```

这里关键就是删掉 `p == p`，只保留真正有信息量的关系。

## 4. Refinement 分层错误：把 functional correctness 塞进 C 侧 invariant

这个错误常见于 refinement case。它未必会立刻表现成一个
“少一句纯事实”的局部卡点，但会让 annotation 结构变重、返工成本变高。

### 错误的 Invariant

下面给出一个坏版 `kmp_rel.c` `constr` 循环不变量：

```c
/*@ Inv Assert
        exists vnext0 l0,
            safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X) &&
            is_prefix_func(vnext0, sublist(0, i, str)) &&
            patn == patn@pre &&
            len == n && n < INT_MAX && 1 <= i &&
            CharArray::full(patn, n + 1, app(str, cons(0, nil))) *
            IntArray::full(vnext, i, vnext0) *
            IntArray::full((vnext + i * sizeof(int)), n - i, l0)
*/
```

这里多出来的坏东西是：

```c
is_prefix_func(vnext0, sublist(0, i, str))
```

### 它导致的错误 VC 长什么样

```coq
... safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from_after(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X)
... IntArray.full(vnext, n, l)
|--
EX vnext1 l1,
   safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i + 1, vnext1, j), X)
   && is_prefix_func(vnext1, sublist(0, i + 1, str))
   && IntArray.full(vnext, i + 1, vnext1)
   ** IntArray.full((vnext + (i + 1) * sizeof(int)), n - (i + 1), l1)
```

这会迫使 C 层 invariant 在每一步都证明 KMP 前缀函数构造的
functional correctness。对于 refinement case，这类 functional
correctness 应只出现在 `high_level_spec` 中；除 `high_level_spec`
外，C 侧 annotation 不应重复出现 monad 已经覆盖的 functional
correctness 谓词。

### 正确的 Invariant

`kmp_rel.c` 里更合理的写法是：

```c
/*@ Inv Assert
        exists vnext0 l0,
            safeExec(ATrue, constr_loop_from(0, str, i, vnext0, j), X) &&
            patn == patn@pre &&
            len == n && n < INT_MAX && 1 <= i &&
            CharArray::full(patn, n + 1, app(str, cons(0, nil))) *
            IntArray::full(vnext, i, vnext0) *
            IntArray::full((vnext + i * sizeof(int)), n - i, l0)
*/
```

这里 invariant 只维护：

- residual `safeExec(...)`
- 当前游标 / progress
- 内存 shape
- 必要的 `@pre` 桥接

而最终 functional correctness：

```c
is_prefix_func(vnext, str)
```

只出现在 `high_level_spec` 里。除 `high_level_spec` 外，C 侧
annotation 不应再次要求证明这一类最终功能语义。

content.content:
1	# QCP Resource Reclaim Errors
2	
3	这个文档记录 QCP 在局部变量 / 局部数组生命周期结束时回收内存失败的排查方式。典型报错包括 `remove permission failed`，或在 `return`、函数尾、局部 scope 结束处出现的局部变量内存回收失败。
4	
5	## 触发含义
6	
7	这类错误通常不是 Rocq proof 问题，而是 annotation 中的 separation logic 资源不完整。QCP 在离开函数或 scope 时需要回收当前 scope 内的局部变量内存；如果 assertion 里缺少某个局部变量的 permission / store，或只保留了局部数组的一部分内存段，回收就会失败。
8	
9	常见原因：
10	
11	- annotation 中漏掉了某些 live 局部变量的资源，例如局部 `store_*(&x, v)` 被前面的 `Assert` / `Inv Assert` 丢掉。
12	- 循环不变量只保留了局部数组的已写前缀或某个 `seg`，但在 `return` 前没有合回完整数组。
13	- 未初始化局部数组被建模成碎片资源，函数结束前没有完整的 `undef_full` 或 `full`。
14	- 使用 `by local` 导出纯事实后，误以为它也会保留局部变量的空间资源。
15	- 为了补权限额外叠加 `has_permission(&x)`，反而和已有 live local store 形成重复资源；应保留精确 store / array 谓词，而不是叠加裸 permission。
16	
17	## 必查位置
18	
19	如果报错发生在 `return` 或 scope 结束处，不要只看报错行本身。应使用 `qcp-mcp` 检查失败点上一句的 symbolic state：
20	
21	1. 在 annotation C scratch 上加载目标文件。
22	2. 运行到失败附近；如果整体 `symbolic` 在 `return` 行失败，先对 `return` 上一行执行 `check`。
23	3. 查看 symbolic state 中是否包含当前 scope 的所有局部变量资源。
24	4. 对局部数组，确认 state 中是完整的一整段数组资源，而不是只剩部分 `seg` / `missing_i` / 前缀后缀碎片。
25	
26	判断标准是：在进入 `return` / scope 结束前，assertion 必须足以让 QCP 回收该 scope 内全部局部变量和局部数组。
27	
28	## 局部数组要求
29	
30	局部数组尤其容易触发这个问题。比如：
31	
32	```c
33	int a[2003];
34	```
35	
36	在 `return` 前，assertion 中应有完整数组资源，例如：
37	
38	```c
39	/*@ IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003) */
40	```
41	
42	或者如果数组内容已经被逻辑列表 `l` 精确描述：
43	
44	```c
45	/*@ IntArray::full(a, 2003, l) */
46	```
47	
48	如果循环中维护的是分段资源，例如“已写前缀 + 未写后缀”，则在离开函数前需要通过 `Assert` 或循环后状态把这些资源合回完整的 `IntArray::full(a, 2003, l)` 或 `IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003)`。不要让 `return` 前只剩：
49	
50	```c
51	/*@ IntArray::seg(a, 0, i, l1) ** IntArray::undef_seg(a, i, 2003) */
52	```
53	
54	除非当前 QCP 策略能够在该点自动合回完整数组，并且 `check` 的 symbolic state 已确认合回成功。保守做法是在 `return` 前显式放置能得到完整数组资源的 `Assert`。
55	
56	## 修复方式
57	
58	- 缺普通局部变量：把对应 `store_*(&x, v)` 保留在需要跨过 `Assert` / `Inv Assert` 的 frame 中。
59	- 缺局部数组：使用 `IntArray` / `UIntArray` / `CharArray` 等 builtin 谓词，补齐完整 `full` / `undef_full`，或先把分段资源合并。
60	- 缺纯边界事实导致合并失败：补上数组长度、下标范围、前后缀边界等纯事实。
61	- scope 内声明的临时变量被 assertion 丢掉：检查最近的 `Assert` 是否只写了算法性质而漏掉 local store。
62	- 如果报错来自下游 witness 或 proof 阶段，应回流 annotation，不能在 manual proof 中硬证明过去。
63	
64	## Report 记录
65	
66	annotation-subagent 返回时，如果本轮修复了这类问题，应在 `qcp-mcp` 摘要中记录：
67	
68	- QCP 原始失败行号和错误信息。
69	- `check` 的行号，通常是失败点上一句。
70	- 失败前 symbolic state 中缺少哪个局部变量 / 数组资源。
71	- 最终补入或合回的资源形态，例如 `store_int(&x, v)`、`IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003)` 或 `IntArray::full(a, 2003, l)`。
72

file.content:
# QCP Resource Reclaim Errors

这个文档记录 QCP 在局部变量 / 局部数组生命周期结束时回收内存失败的排查方式。典型报错包括 `remove permission failed`，或在 `return`、函数尾、局部 scope 结束处出现的局部变量内存回收失败。

## 触发含义

这类错误通常不是 Rocq proof 问题，而是 annotation 中的 separation logic 资源不完整。QCP 在离开函数或 scope 时需要回收当前 scope 内的局部变量内存；如果 assertion 里缺少某个局部变量的 permission / store，或只保留了局部数组的一部分内存段，回收就会失败。

常见原因：

- annotation 中漏掉了某些 live 局部变量的资源，例如局部 `store_*(&x, v)` 被前面的 `Assert` / `Inv Assert` 丢掉。
- 循环不变量只保留了局部数组的已写前缀或某个 `seg`，但在 `return` 前没有合回完整数组。
- 未初始化局部数组被建模成碎片资源，函数结束前没有完整的 `undef_full` 或 `full`。
- 使用 `by local` 导出纯事实后，误以为它也会保留局部变量的空间资源。
- 为了补权限额外叠加 `has_permission(&x)`，反而和已有 live local store 形成重复资源；应保留精确 store / array 谓词，而不是叠加裸 permission。

## 必查位置

如果报错发生在 `return` 或 scope 结束处，不要只看报错行本身。应使用 `qcp-mcp` 检查失败点上一句的 symbolic state：

1. 在 annotation C scratch 上加载目标文件。
2. 运行到失败附近；如果整体 `symbolic` 在 `return` 行失败，先对 `return` 上一行执行 `check`。
3. 查看 symbolic state 中是否包含当前 scope 的所有局部变量资源。
4. 对局部数组，确认 state 中是完整的一整段数组资源，而不是只剩部分 `seg` / `missing_i` / 前缀后缀碎片。

判断标准是：在进入 `return` / scope 结束前，assertion 必须足以让 QCP 回收该 scope 内全部局部变量和局部数组。

## 局部数组要求

局部数组尤其容易触发这个问题。比如：

```c
int a[2003];
```

在 `return` 前，assertion 中应有完整数组资源，例如：

```c
/*@ IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003) */
```

或者如果数组内容已经被逻辑列表 `l` 精确描述：

```c
/*@ IntArray::full(a, 2003, l) */
```

如果循环中维护的是分段资源，例如“已写前缀 + 未写后缀”，则在离开函数前需要通过 `Assert` 或循环后状态把这些资源合回完整的 `IntArray::full(a, 2003, l)` 或 `IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003)`。不要让 `return` 前只剩：

```c
/*@ IntArray::seg(a, 0, i, l1) ** IntArray::undef_seg(a, i, 2003) */
```

除非当前 QCP 策略能够在该点自动合回完整数组，并且 `check` 的 symbolic state 已确认合回成功。保守做法是在 `return` 前显式放置能得到完整数组资源的 `Assert`。

## 修复方式

- 缺普通局部变量：把对应 `store_*(&x, v)` 保留在需要跨过 `Assert` / `Inv Assert` 的 frame 中。
- 缺局部数组：使用 `IntArray` / `UIntArray` / `CharArray` 等 builtin 谓词，补齐完整 `full` / `undef_full`，或先把分段资源合并。
- 缺纯边界事实导致合并失败：补上数组长度、下标范围、前后缀边界等纯事实。
- scope 内声明的临时变量被 assertion 丢掉：检查最近的 `Assert` 是否只写了算法性质而漏掉 local store。
- 如果报错来自下游 witness 或 proof 阶段，应回流 annotation，不能在 manual proof 中硬证明过去。

## Report 记录

annotation-subagent 返回时，如果本轮修复了这类问题，应在 `qcp-mcp` 摘要中记录：

- QCP 原始失败行号和错误信息。
- `check` 的行号，通常是失败点上一句。
- 失败前 symbolic state 中缺少哪个局部变量 / 数组资源。
- 最终补入或合回的资源形态，例如 `store_int(&x, v)`、`IntArray::undef_full(a, 2003)` 或 `IntArray::full(a, 2003, l)`。

  &&  “ (((2 * numbers_size_pre ) - 1 ) < INT_MAX) ” 
  &&  “ ((Zlength (l)) = numbers_size_pre) ”
  &&  (IntArray.full numbers_pre numbers_size_pre l )
  **  (IntArray.seg out_pre 0 (2 * i ) outl2 )
  **  (IntArray.undef_seg out_pre (2 * i ) ((2 * numbers_size_pre ) - 1 ) )
|--
  “ (1 <= i) ” 
  &&  “ (i < numbers_size_pre) ” 
  &&  “ (k = (2 * i )) ” 
  &&  “ (0 < numbers_size_pre) ” 
  &&  “ (((2 * numbers_size_pre ) - 1 ) < INT_MAX) ” 
  &&  “ ((Zlength (l)) = numbers_size_pre) ”
  &&  (((out_pre + (k * sizeof(INT) ) )) # Int  |->_)
  **  (IntArray.undef_missing_i out_pre k (2 * i ) ((2 * numbers_size_pre ) - 1 ) )
  **  (IntArray.full numbers_pre numbers_size_pre l )
  **  (IntArray.seg out_pre 0 (2 * i ) outl2 )
.

Module Type VC_Correct.

Include int_array_Strategy_Correct.
Include uint_array_Strategy_Correct.
Include undef_uint_array_Strategy_Correct.
Include array_shape_Strategy_Correct.

content.thinking:
Now I can see all the VCs. The proof_manual has 4 Admitted lemmas to prove:

1. `p005_intersperse_entail_wit_1`: Loop initialization - prove that after writing `numbers[0]` to `out[0]`, the loop invariant holds for i=1
2. `p005_intersperse_entail_wit_2`: Intermediate assert - prove that after writing delimeter and incrementing k, the intermediate Assert holds
3. `p005_intersperse_entail_wit_3`: Loop step - prove that after writing `numbers[i]` and incrementing k, then i++, the loop invariant is preserved
4. `p005_intersperse_return_wit_1`: Return - prove that when the loop exits (i >= numbers_size_pre), the Ensure holds

For the loop initialization, I need to show that given the preconditions about the array sizes and the list structure, after placing the first number in the output array, the loop invariant is satisfied. The context includes the original list length, the constraint that the output size won't overflow, and the relationship between the input array and the list representation. Deriving the segment and undefined segment predicates from the cell assignment, then moving into the second write phase where I'm extending the segment to include the delimiter. The segment covering positions 0 to 2*i already includes position 2*i-1, so the remaining undefined region is just from 2*i onward to 2*n-1, which the `undef_missing_i` predicate captures by marking that hole at k = 2*i-1.

For the loop step after the second write, I need to establish that `outl2` equals the original output list with the delimiter appended, and that k has advanced to 2*i, setting up the invariant for the next iteration. The arithmetic checks out—`2*(i+1)-1` equals `2*i+1`, so the segment bounds match between the two sides. Applying `undef_missing_i` with `k = 2*i` should correctly produce the undefined segment from `2*i+1` to `2*n-1`. Now I'm looking at the return witness case where `i >= n`, which establishes the preconditions for the final segment and undefined portions.

When the loop terminates with `i = n`, the key value becomes `k = 2*n-1`, and the segment from 0 to `2*n-1` represents the complete array, while the undefined segment from `2*n-1` to `2*n-1` is empty. The full array property should follow directly from combining the segment covering the entire range with the empty undefined portion.

- `proof_manual.v` handles `entail_wit` (invariant initialization/preservation/return)

But here `proof_auto.v` has everything as `Admitted`, which means the auto-prover didn't solve anything yet. The safety witnesses look straightforward—just basic arithmetic constraints like `0 <= INT_MAX && INT_MIN <= 0`—so these should be provable automatically. In the standard framework, `proof_auto.v` is supposed to handle these, but since they're all admitted here, it seems like the auto-proof stage still needs to be completed.

Looking at the file structure more carefully, `proof_manual.v` contains the four `entail_wit` and `return_wit` lemmas I need to prove, while `proof_auto.v` handles the safety and partial_solve witnesses through auto tactics. The `goal_check.v` then combines both files to verify the full proof. I should check the vc-proving documentation to understand the proof tactics and workflow better.

# Rocq 编译检查

完成 symexec 刷新后，需要按依赖顺序编译相关文件。以下命令以 `examples` 为例：

```bash
coqc -R SeparationLogic/SeparationLogic SimpleC.SL -R SeparationLogic/unifysl Logic -R SeparationLogic/sets SetsClass -R SeparationLogic/compcert_lib compcert.lib -R SeparationLogic/auxlibs AUXLib -R SeparationLogic/examples SimpleC.EE -R SeparationLogic/StrategyLib SimpleC.StrategyLib -R SeparationLogic/Common SimpleC.Common -R SeparationLogic/fixedpoints FP -R SeparationLogic/MonadLib MonadLib -R SeparationLogic/listlib ListLib SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_LLM/examples_lib.v
coqc -R SeparationLogic/SeparationLogic SimpleC.SL -R SeparationLogic/unifysl Logic -R SeparationLogic/sets SetsClass -R SeparationLogic/compcert_lib compcert.lib -R SeparationLogic/auxlibs AUXLib -R SeparationLogic/examples SimpleC.EE -R SeparationLogic/StrategyLib SimpleC.StrategyLib -R SeparationLogic/Common SimpleC.Common -R SeparationLogic/fixedpoints FP -R SeparationLogic/MonadLib MonadLib -R SeparationLogic/listlib ListLib SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_LLM/examples_goal.v
coqc -R SeparationLogic/SeparationLogic SimpleC.SL -R SeparationLogic/unifysl Logic -R SeparationLogic/sets SetsClass -R SeparationLogic/compcert_lib compcert.lib -R SeparationLogic/auxlibs AUXLib -R SeparationLogic/examples SimpleC.EE -R SeparationLogic/StrategyLib SimpleC.StrategyLib -R SeparationLogic/Common SimpleC.Common -R SeparationLogic/fixedpoints FP -R SeparationLogic/MonadLib MonadLib -R SeparationLogic/listlib ListLib SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_LLM/examples_proof_auto.v
coqc -R SeparationLogic/SeparationLogic SimpleC.SL -R SeparationLogic/unifysl Logic -R SeparationLogic/sets SetsClass -R SeparationLogic/compcert_lib compcert.lib -R SeparationLogic/auxlibs AUXLib -R SeparationLogic/examples SimpleC.EE -R SeparationLogic/StrategyLib SimpleC.StrategyLib -R SeparationLogic/Common SimpleC.Common -R SeparationLogic/fixedpoints FP -R SeparationLogic/MonadLib MonadLib -R SeparationLogic/listlib ListLib SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_LLM/examples_proof_manual.v
coqc -R SeparationLogic/SeparationLogic SimpleC.SL -R SeparationLogic/unifysl Logic -R SeparationLogic/sets SetsClass -R SeparationLogic/compcert_lib compcert.lib -R SeparationLogic/auxlibs AUXLib -R SeparationLogic/examples SimpleC.EE -R SeparationLogic/StrategyLib SimpleC.StrategyLib -R SeparationLogic/Common SimpleC.Common -R SeparationLogic/fixedpoints FP -R SeparationLogic/MonadLib MonadLib -R SeparationLogic/listlib ListLib SeparationLogic/examples/QCP_demos_LLM/examples_goal_check.v
```

## 重点

- 这里的 `examples_lib.v` 是该 case 的 `common_case_formal_lib`，包含 annotation-checking 通过并冻结的 spec 定义，以及 vc-proving 迁入的 audited helper-suffix imports / helper lemmas；编译顺序必须先于 `goal.v` / `proof_manual.v`。
- `examples_goal_check.v` 用于确认所有需要的 goal 都已经被 `proof_auto` 或 `proof_manual` 覆盖。
- `examples_proof_manual.v` 最终只应包含 manual witness theorem proofs；若这里混入 helper lemmas、helper definitions、`Admitted` 或额外 `Axiom`，属于 final-check 失败。
- 如果目标文件位于子目录，相关路径和逻辑命名空间也要一并调整。

content.content:
1	# Whole-proof Tactics
2	
3	**术语说明**：
4	- 在证明结论 `P |-- Q` 中，P 称为**前条件**，Q 称为**后条件**
5	- **前提**指 Coq 中的 Hypothesis
6	
7	## 1. `pre_process`
8	
9	**功能**：展开定义、引入变量、提取前条件中的纯命题。
10	
11	**用途**：每个证明开头必用。
12	
13	**注意**：一般而言，每个证明会帮你做好 `pre_process` 这一步，你无需自己调用，只需顺着它继续推进证明。
14	
15	## 2. `Intros x` / `Intros x y ...`
16	
17	**功能**：引入前条件中 `EX` 修饰的变量，命名为 x。
18	
19	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
20	
21	使用前：
22	```proof state
23	条件...
24	===============================
25	EX n, [|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
26	```
27	
28	使用：`Intros n.`
29	
30	使用后：
31	```proof state
32	条件...
33	n : nat
34	===============================
35	[|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
36	```
37	
38	## 3. `Intros_p H`
39	
40	**功能**：引入前条件中的纯命题 `[| P |]`，命名为 `H`。
41	
42	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
43	
44	使用前：
45	```proof state
46	条件...
47	===============================
48	[|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
49	```
50	
51	使用：`Intros_p H.`
52	
53	使用后：
54	```proof state
55	条件...
56	H: n > 0
57	===============================
58	sll p l |-- ...
59	```
60	
61	## 4. `Exists x` / `Exists x y ...`
62	
63	**功能**：实例化后条件中的存在量词。
64	
65	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
66	
67	使用前：
68	```proof state
69	条件...
70	l_1 : list
71	l_2 : list
72	===============================
73	sll p l |-- EX l1 l2, [|l = l1 ++ l2|] && ...
74	```
75	
76	使用：`Exists l_1 l_2.`
77	
78	使用后：
79	```proof state
80	条件...
81	l_1 : list
82	l_2 : list
83	===============================
84	sll p l |-- [|l = l_1 ++ l_2|] && ...
85	```
86	
87	## 5. `cancel P`
88	
89	**功能**：消去前后条件中形式相同的空间谓词 `P`；若不严格匹配则报错。
90	
91	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
92	
93	使用前：
94	```proof state
95	条件...
96	===============================
97	sll p l |-- sllseg p p nil ** sll p l
98	```
99	
100	使用：`cancel (sll p l).`
101	
102	使用后：
103	```proof state
104	条件...
105	===============================
106	emp |-- sllseg p p nil
107	```
108	
109	**注意**：
110	1. 前后条件的空间谓词 `P` 需严格（形式上）相同，仅语义相同不能通过；`cancel` 不做任何化简。
111	2. 当前后条件只剩一个相同谓词如 `P |-- P` 时，`cancel P` 直接完成目标，不会再产生 `emp |-- emp`，因此无需再使用 `cancel emp`。
112	
113	## 6. `sep_apply_l_atomic`
114	
115	**功能**：应用分离逻辑引理变换前条件，需显式实例化所有变量。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- R`，使用 `sep_apply_l_atomic (H x)` 会：
116	1. 将前条件中的 `P ** Q` 替换为 `R`
117	2. 若引理有 Prop 前提 `C`，生成子目标 `前条件 |-- [| C |]` 供手动证明
118	
119	注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量，否则报错；但无需提供前提 `C` 的证明，会自动生成子目标。
120	
121	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
122	
123	**场景1：引理无 Prop 前提**
124	```coq
125	Lemma sllseg_sll: forall x y l1 l2,
126	  sllseg x y l1 ** sll y l2 |--
127	  sll x (l1 ++ l2).
128	```
129	
130	使用前：
131	```proof state
132	p: Z
133	l1, l2: list
134	===============================
135	sllseg p q l1 ** sll q l2 ** M |-- N
136	```
137	
138	使用：`sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_sll p q l1 l2).`
139	
140	使用后（只有一个目标）：
141	```proof state
142	p: Z
143	l1, l2: list
144	===============================
145	sll p (l1 ++ l2) ** M |-- N
146	```
147	
148	**场景2：引理有 Prop 前提**
149	```coq
150	Lemma sll_not_zero: forall x l,
151	  x <> NULL ->
152	  sll x l |--
153	    EX y a l0,
154	      [| l = a :: l0 |] &&
155	      &(x # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
156	      &(x # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
157	      sll y l0.
158	```
159	
160	使用前：
161	```proof state
162	p: Z
163	l: list
164	===============================
165	sll p l ** M |-- N
166	```
167	
168	使用：`sep_apply_l_atomic (sll_not_zero p l).`
169	
170	使用后（生成两个子目标）：
171	
172	子目标1（纯命题子目标，需手动证明）：
173	```proof state
174	p: Z
175	l: list
176	===============================
177	sll p l ** M |-- [| p <> NULL |]
178	```
179	
180	子目标2（主目标，假设前提成立后的结果）：
181	```proof state
182	p: Z
183	l: list
184	===============================
185	(EX y a l0,
186	  [| l = a :: l0 |] &&
187	  &(p # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
188	  &(p # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
189	  sll y l0) ** M |-- N
190	```
191	
192	## 7. `sep_apply_r_atomic`
193	
194	**功能**：应用分离逻辑引理变换后条件，需显式实例化所有变量。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- R`，使用 `sep_apply_r_atomic (H x)` 会：
195	1. 将后条件中的 `R` 替换为 `P ** Q`
196	2. 若引理有 Prop 前提 `C`，生成子目标 `前条件 |-- [| C |]` 供手动证明
197	
198	注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量，否则报错；但无需提供前提 `C` 的证明，会自动生成子目标。
199	
200	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
201	
202	**场景1：引理无 Prop 前提**
203	```coq
204	Lemma nil_sllseg_l: forall p q,
205	  [| p = q |] && emp |-- sllseg p q nil.
206	```
207	
208	使用前：
209	```proof state
210	p: Z
211	===============================
212	M |-- N ** sllseg p p nil
213	```
214	
215	使用：`sep_apply_r_atomic (nil_sllseg_l p p).`
216	
217	使用后（只有一个目标）：
218	```proof state
219	p: Z
220	===============================
221	M |-- N ** ([| p = p |] && emp)
222	```
223	
224	**场景2：引理有 Prop 前提**
225	```coq
226	Lemma cons_sll_l: forall x a l y,
227	  x <> NULL ->
228	  &(x # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
229	  &(x # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
230	  sll y l |--
231	  sll x (a :: l).
232	```
233	
234	使用前：
235	```proof state
236	p: Z
237	a: Z
238	l: list
239	y: addr
240	===============================
241	M |-- N ** sll p (a :: l)
242	```
243	
244	使用：`sep_apply_r_atomic (cons_sll_l p a l y).`
245	
246	使用后（生成两个子目标）：
247	
248	子目标1（纯命题子目标）：
249	```proof state
250	p: Z
251	a: Z
252	l: list
253	y: addr
254	===============================
255	M |-- [| p <> NULL |]
256	```
257	
258	子目标2（主目标）：
259	```proof state
260	p: Z
261	a: Z
262	l: list
263	y: addr
264	===============================
265	M |-- N ** (&(p # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
266	            &(p # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
267	            sll y l)
268	```
269	
270	## 8. `prop_apply_p`
271	
272	**功能**：利用前条件中的命题推导新纯命题并加入前条件。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- [| R |]`，且证明目标形如 `P ** Q ** M |-- N`，使用 `prop_apply_p (H x C)` 会在前条件中添加 `[| R |]`。
273	
274	注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量和前提，否则报错。
275	
276	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
277	```coq
278	Lemma sll_not_zero': forall x l,
279	  x <> NULL ->
280	  sll x l |-- [| l <> nil |].
281	```
282	
283	使用前：
284	```proof state
285	p: Z
286	l: list
287	H: x <> NULL
288	===============================
289	sll p l ** Q |-- R
290	```
291	
292	使用：`prop_apply_p (sll_not_zero' p l H).`
293	
294	使用后：
295	```proof state
296	p: Z
297	l: list
298	H: x <> NULL
299	===============================
300	[| l <> nil |] && sll p l ** Q |-- R
301	```
302	
303	## 9. `Left` / `Right` / `Split`
304	
305	- **`Left`**：将 `P |-- Q || R` 变为 `P |-- Q`
306	- **`Right`**：将 `P |-- Q || R` 变为 `P |-- R`
307	- **`Split`**：将 `P || Q |-- R` 拆为两个子目标：`P |-- R` 和 `Q |-- R`
308	
309	**示例（`Left` 证明状态变化）**：
310	
311	使用前：
312	```proof state
313	===============================
314	P |-- Q || R
315	```
316	
317	使用：`Left.`
318	
319	使用后：
320	```proof state
321	===============================
322	P |-- Q
323	```
324	
325	## 10. `split_pures.`
326	
327	**功能**：将合取的纯命题目标拆分为多个子目标，逐一处理。
328	
329	**用途**：纯命题证明开头必用。
330	
331	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
332	
333	使用前：
334	```proof state
335	条件...
336	H: n = 0
337	===============================
338	sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |] && [| n = 0 |]
339	```
340	
341	使用：`split_pures.`
342	
343	使用后：
344	
345	子目标1：
346	```proof state
347	条件...
348	H: n = 0
349	===============================
350	sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |]
351	```
352	
353	子目标2：
354	```proof state
355	条件...
356	H: n = 0
357	===============================
358	sll p l |-- [| n = 0 |]
359	```
360	
361	## 11. `dump_pre_spatial`
362	
363	**功能**：在准备好所有纯命题前提后，丢弃前条件中的空间命题，进入纯命题证明模式。即在条件不变的情况下，将证明状态从 `P |-- [| Q |]` 变为 `Q`。
364	
365	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
366	
367	使用前：
368	```proof state
369	条件...
370	===============================
371	sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |]
372	```
373	
374	使用：`dump_pre_spatial.`
375	
376	使用后：
377	```proof state
378	条件...
379	===============================
380	l1 = l2
381	```
382	
383	## 12. `Intros_r x` / `Intros_r x y ...`
384	
385	**功能**：引入后条件中 `ALL` 修饰的变量，命名为 x。
386	
387	**示例（证明状态变化）**：
388	
389	使用前：
390	```proof state
391	条件...
392	===============================
393	... |-- ALL x : nat, [| x = 0 |] && ...
394	```
395	
396	使用：`Intros_r n.`
397	
398	使用后：
399	```proof state
400	条件...
401	n : nat
402	===============================
403	... |-- [| n = 0 |] && ...
404	```
405	
406	## 示例证明
407	
408	```rocq
409	Definition length_entail_wit_2 :=
410	forall (p_pre: Z) (l: (@list Z)) (p: Z) (n: Z) (l1_2: (@list Z)) (l2_2: (@list Z)) (p_next: Z) (p_data: Z) (l3: (@list Z)) ,
411	  [| (l2_2 = (cons (p_data) (l3))) |]
412	  &&  [| (p <> 0) |]
413	  &&  [| (l = (app (l1_2) (l2_2))) |]
414	  &&  [| (n = (Zlength (l1_2))) |]
415	  &&  [| ((Zlength (l)) <= INT_MAX) |]
416	  &&  ((&((p)  # "list" ->ₛ "data")) # Int  |-> p_data)
417	  **  ((&((p)  # "list" ->ₛ "next")) # Ptr  |-> p_next)
418	  **  (sll p_next l3 )
419	  **  (sllseg p_pre p l1_2 )
420	|--
421	  EX (l1: (@list Z))  (l2: (@list Z)) ,
422	  [| (l = (app (l1) (l2))) |]
423	  &&  [| ((n + 1 ) = (Zlength (l1))) |]
424	  &&  [| ((Zlength (l)) <= INT_MAX) |]
425	  &&  (sllseg p_pre p_next l1 )
426	  **  (sll p_next l2 )
427	.
428	
429	Lemma proof_of_length_entail_wit_2 : length_entail_wit_2.
430	Proof.
431	  pre_process.
432	  Exists (l1_2 ++ (p_data :: nil)) l3.
433	  split_pure_spatial.
434	  - cancel (sll p_next l3).
435	    sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_len1 p p_data p_next).
436	    + dump_pre_spatial.
437	      unfold NULL.
438	      assumption.
439	    + sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_sllseg p_pre p p_next l1_2 (p_data :: nil)).
440	      cancel (sllseg p_pre p_next (l1_2 ++ (p_data :: nil))).
441	  - split_pures.
442	    + dump_pre_spatial.
443	      rewrite H in H1.
444	      rewrite H1.
445	      assert (forall (A: Type) (l1: list A) (a: A) (l2: list A), (l1 ++ a :: nil) ++ l2 = l1 ++ a :: l2).
446	      { intros A l1 a l2.
447	        induction l1; simpl.
448	        - reflexivity.
449	        - rewrite IHl1.
450	          reflexivity. }
451	      rewrite (H4 _ l1_2 p_data l3).
452	      reflexivity.
453	    + dump_pre_spatial.
454	      rewrite Zlength_app.
455	      rewrite Zlength_cons, Zlength_nil.
456	      rewrite H2.
457	      lia.
458	    + dump_pre_spatial.
459	      assumption.
460	Qed.
461	```
462

# Whole-proof Tactics

**术语说明**：
- 在证明结论 `P |-- Q` 中，P 称为**前条件**，Q 称为**后条件**
- **前提**指 Coq 中的 Hypothesis

## 1. `pre_process`

**功能**：展开定义、引入变量、提取前条件中的纯命题。

**用途**：每个证明开头必用。

**注意**：一般而言，每个证明会帮你做好 `pre_process` 这一步，你无需自己调用，只需顺着它继续推进证明。

## 2. `Intros x` / `Intros x y ...`

**功能**：引入前条件中 `EX` 修饰的变量，命名为 x。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
EX n, [|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
```

使用：`Intros n.`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
n : nat
===============================
[|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
```

## 3. `Intros_p H`

**功能**：引入前条件中的纯命题 `[| P |]`，命名为 `H`。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
[|n > 0|] && sll p l |-- ...
```

使用：`Intros_p H.`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
H: n > 0
===============================
sll p l |-- ...
```

## 4. `Exists x` / `Exists x y ...`

**功能**：实例化后条件中的存在量词。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
l_1 : list
l_2 : list
===============================
sll p l |-- EX l1 l2, [|l = l1 ++ l2|] && ...
```

使用：`Exists l_1 l_2.`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
l_1 : list
l_2 : list
===============================
sll p l |-- [|l = l_1 ++ l_2|] && ...
```

## 5. `cancel P`

**功能**：消去前后条件中形式相同的空间谓词 `P`；若不严格匹配则报错。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
sll p l |-- sllseg p p nil ** sll p l
```

使用：`cancel (sll p l).`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
emp |-- sllseg p p nil
```

**注意**：
1. 前后条件的空间谓词 `P` 需严格（形式上）相同，仅语义相同不能通过；`cancel` 不做任何化简。
2. 当前后条件只剩一个相同谓词如 `P |-- P` 时，`cancel P` 直接完成目标，不会再产生 `emp |-- emp`，因此无需再使用 `cancel emp`。

## 6. `sep_apply_l_atomic`

**功能**：应用分离逻辑引理变换前条件，需显式实例化所有变量。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- R`，使用 `sep_apply_l_atomic (H x)` 会：
1. 将前条件中的 `P ** Q` 替换为 `R`
2. 若引理有 Prop 前提 `C`，生成子目标 `前条件 |-- [| C |]` 供手动证明

注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量，否则报错；但无需提供前提 `C` 的证明，会自动生成子目标。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

**场景1：引理无 Prop 前提**
```coq
Lemma sllseg_sll: forall x y l1 l2,
  sllseg x y l1 ** sll y l2 |--
  sll x (l1 ++ l2).
```

使用前：
```proof state
p: Z
l1, l2: list
===============================
sllseg p q l1 ** sll q l2 ** M |-- N
```

使用：`sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_sll p q l1 l2).`

使用后（只有一个目标）：
```proof state
p: Z
l1, l2: list
===============================
sll p (l1 ++ l2) ** M |-- N
```

**场景2：引理有 Prop 前提**
```coq
Lemma sll_not_zero: forall x l,
  x <> NULL ->
  sll x l |--
    EX y a l0,
      [| l = a :: l0 |] &&
      &(x # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
      &(x # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
      sll y l0.
```

使用前：
```proof state
p: Z
l: list
===============================
sll p l ** M |-- N
```

使用：`sep_apply_l_atomic (sll_not_zero p l).`

使用后（生成两个子目标）：

子目标1（纯命题子目标，需手动证明）：
```proof state
p: Z
l: list
===============================
sll p l ** M |-- [| p <> NULL |]
```

子目标2（主目标，假设前提成立后的结果）：
```proof state
p: Z
l: list
===============================
(EX y a l0,
  [| l = a :: l0 |] &&
  &(p # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
  &(p # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
  sll y l0) ** M |-- N
```

## 7. `sep_apply_r_atomic`

**功能**：应用分离逻辑引理变换后条件，需显式实例化所有变量。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- R`，使用 `sep_apply_r_atomic (H x)` 会：
1. 将后条件中的 `R` 替换为 `P ** Q`
2. 若引理有 Prop 前提 `C`，生成子目标 `前条件 |-- [| C |]` 供手动证明

注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量，否则报错；但无需提供前提 `C` 的证明，会自动生成子目标。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

**场景1：引理无 Prop 前提**
```coq
Lemma nil_sllseg_l: forall p q,
  [| p = q |] && emp |-- sllseg p q nil.
```

使用前：
```proof state
p: Z
===============================
M |-- N ** sllseg p p nil
```

使用：`sep_apply_r_atomic (nil_sllseg_l p p).`

使用后（只有一个目标）：
```proof state
p: Z
===============================
M |-- N ** ([| p = p |] && emp)
```

**场景2：引理有 Prop 前提**
```coq
Lemma cons_sll_l: forall x a l y,
  x <> NULL ->
  &(x # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
  &(x # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
  sll y l |--
  sll x (a :: l).
```

使用前：
```proof state
p: Z
a: Z
l: list
y: addr
===============================
M |-- N ** sll p (a :: l)
```

使用：`sep_apply_r_atomic (cons_sll_l p a l y).`

使用后（生成两个子目标）：

子目标1（纯命题子目标）：
```proof state
p: Z
a: Z
l: list
y: addr
===============================
M |-- [| p <> NULL |]
```

子目标2（主目标）：
```proof state
p: Z
a: Z
l: list
y: addr
===============================
M |-- N ** (&(p # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> a **
            &(p # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> y **
            sll y l)
```

## 8. `prop_apply_p`

**功能**：利用前条件中的命题推导新纯命题并加入前条件。若引理形如 `H: forall x: T, C -> P ** Q |-- [| R |]`，且证明目标形如 `P ** Q ** M |-- N`，使用 `prop_apply_p (H x C)` 会在前条件中添加 `[| R |]`。

注意：此 tactic 强制要求显式实例化引理中的所有变量和前提，否则报错。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：
```coq
Lemma sll_not_zero': forall x l,
  x <> NULL ->
  sll x l |-- [| l <> nil |].
```

使用前：
```proof state
p: Z
l: list
H: x <> NULL
===============================
sll p l ** Q |-- R
```

使用：`prop_apply_p (sll_not_zero' p l H).`

使用后：
```proof state
p: Z
l: list
H: x <> NULL
===============================
[| l <> nil |] && sll p l ** Q |-- R
```

## 9. `Left` / `Right` / `Split`

- **`Left`**：将 `P |-- Q || R` 变为 `P |-- Q`
- **`Right`**：将 `P |-- Q || R` 变为 `P |-- R`
- **`Split`**：将 `P || Q |-- R` 拆为两个子目标：`P |-- R` 和 `Q |-- R`

**示例（`Left` 证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
===============================
P |-- Q || R
```

使用：`Left.`

使用后：
```proof state
===============================
P |-- Q
```

## 10. `split_pures.`

**功能**：将合取的纯命题目标拆分为多个子目标，逐一处理。

**用途**：纯命题证明开头必用。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
H: n = 0
===============================
sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |] && [| n = 0 |]
```

使用：`split_pures.`

使用后：

子目标1：
```proof state
条件...
H: n = 0
===============================
sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |]
```

子目标2：
```proof state
条件...
H: n = 0
===============================
sll p l |-- [| n = 0 |]
```

## 11. `dump_pre_spatial`

**功能**：在准备好所有纯命题前提后，丢弃前条件中的空间命题，进入纯命题证明模式。即在条件不变的情况下，将证明状态从 `P |-- [| Q |]` 变为 `Q`。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
sll p l |-- [| l1 = l2 |]
```

使用：`dump_pre_spatial.`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
l1 = l2
```

## 12. `Intros_r x` / `Intros_r x y ...`

**功能**：引入后条件中 `ALL` 修饰的变量，命名为 x。

**示例（证明状态变化）**：

使用前：
```proof state
条件...
===============================
... |-- ALL x : nat, [| x = 0 |] && ...
```

使用：`Intros_r n.`

使用后：
```proof state
条件...
n : nat
===============================
... |-- [| n = 0 |] && ...
```

## 示例证明

```rocq
Definition length_entail_wit_2 :=
forall (p_pre: Z) (l: (@list Z)) (p: Z) (n: Z) (l1_2: (@list Z)) (l2_2: (@list Z)) (p_next: Z) (p_data: Z) (l3: (@list Z)) ,
  [| (l2_2 = (cons (p_data) (l3))) |]
  &&  [| (p <> 0) |]
  &&  [| (l = (app (l1_2) (l2_2))) |]
  &&  [| (n = (Zlength (l1_2))) |]
  &&  [| ((Zlength (l)) <= INT_MAX) |]
  &&  ((&((p)  # "list" ->ₛ "data")) # Int  |-> p_data)
  **  ((&((p)  # "list" ->ₛ "next")) # Ptr  |-> p_next)
  **  (sll p_next l3 )
  **  (sllseg p_pre p l1_2 )
|--
  EX (l1: (@list Z))  (l2: (@list Z)) ,
  [| (l = (app (l1) (l2))) |]
  &&  [| ((n + 1 ) = (Zlength (l1))) |]
  &&  [| ((Zlength (l)) <= INT_MAX) |]
  &&  (sllseg p_pre p_next l1 )
  **  (sll p_next l2 )
.

Lemma proof_of_length_entail_wit_2 : length_entail_wit_2.
Proof.
  pre_process.
  Exists (l1_2 ++ (p_data :: nil)) l3.
  split_pure_spatial.
  - cancel (sll p_next l3).
    sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_len1 p p_data p_next).
    + dump_pre_spatial.
      unfold NULL.
      assumption.
    + sep_apply_l_atomic (sllseg_sllseg p_pre p p_next l1_2 (p_data :: nil)).
      cancel (sllseg p_pre p_next (l1_2 ++ (p_data :: nil))).
  - split_pures.
    + dump_pre_spatial.
      rewrite H in H1.
      rewrite H1.
      assert (forall (A: Type) (l1: list A) (a: A) (l2: list A), (l1 ++ a :: nil) ++ l2 = l1 ++ a :: l2).
      { intros A l1 a l2.
        induction l1; simpl.
        - reflexivity.
        - rewrite IHl1.
          reflexivity. }
      rewrite (H4 _ l1_2 p_data l3).
      reflexivity.
    + dump_pre_spatial.
      rewrite Zlength_app.
      rewrite Zlength_cons, Zlength_nil.
      rewrite H2.
      lia.
    + dump_pre_spatial.
      assumption.
Qed.
```

content.content:
1	# 使用注意
2	
3	这个文件用于说明应用 `vc-proving` 时必须优先遵守的细节。
4	
5	- phase、ledger 状态、delegation 和 stale 规则统一以 `verification-orchestrator` 为准；本文件只保留 proving 相关硬规则。
6	- `vc-proving-subagent` 必须先从最新正式 `*_proof_manual.v` / `common_case_formal_lib` 创建 proving scratch pair，其中 lib 侧副本为本轮 `task_local_scratch_lib`。默认使用 `scripts/` 中的并发 worker 流水线；若已记录 Codex CLI / transport / backend / worker 会话不可恢复，则允许在同一 proving scratch 上进入串行 fallback。
7	- `vc-proving` 是长时间迭代 phase；本轮一旦交给 `vc-proving-subagent`，就应持续工作到 `completed`、`blocked` 或 `stale`，而不是只交第一版思路。
8	- `vc-proving` 必须保留 timing 摘要：pipeline 命令、worker / fallback proof search、`coqc` 编译、helper migration 和 verify gate 都要记录耗时；返回时指出最慢 witness/helper 和主要 proof bottleneck。
9	- 如果本轮是回流轮次，先读 `Re-entry Brief`，不要自己猜测为什么再次进入 `vc-proving`。
10	- 不要手写改动 `*_goal.v`、`*_proof_auto.v`、`*_goal_check.v`。
11	- 正式与最终 handoff 的 scratch `*_proof_manual.v` 只允许包含 manual witness theorem proofs；不要把 helper lemmas、helper definitions 或额外结构留在这里。
12	- `common_case_formal_lib` 与 `task_local_scratch_lib` 都遵守冻结前缀合同：前缀不可改写；merged manual 完成后只允许在 `task_local_scratch_lib` 后缀追加 audited helper-suffix `Require Import` 行和 migrated proved helper lemmas。
13	- 如果 scratch 里需要 reusable helper lemma，并发 worker 应写到本组 `worker_helper_scratch_lib`，经 `validate_and_merge.py` 收集到 merged manual，再由 `migrate_helpers_to_lib.py` 迁移进 `task_local_scratch_lib`。worker manual 只放 witness proof。
14	- helper lemma 不允许新增顶层 `Definition` / `Fixpoint` / `Inductive` / `Notation` / `Axiom`。如果 helper proof 需要额外库，只能在 `worker_helper_scratch_lib` 中加入最小 `Require Import` / `From ... Require Import` 行；迁移脚本会拒绝 `SimpleC.EE.*` 生成 case imports，并把通过审计的 imports 记录为 `migrated_helper_imports`。
15	- 如果证明推进必须修改冻结前缀，或必须新增上述顶层定义，则本轮应返回 `blocked`，而不是继续扩张文件职责。
16	- proving scratch `*_proof_manual.v` 继续依赖最新正式 `*_goal.v` / `*_proof_auto.v`，但其 lib 依赖必须通过 canonical case dependency overlay 切换到 `task_local_scratch_lib`。
17	- `prepare_agent_concurrent.py` 必须在 base workdir 和每个 group workdir 中创建 worker-local `_CoqProject`，优先消费 `vc-checking` 的 `witness_group_plan`，把每组 proof pattern notes 写入 worker `AGENTS.md`。脚本还必须创建只读 `case_deps/` overlay：正式 `*_goal.v` 保持 canonical `<case>_goal.v` 文件名，本轮 `task_local_scratch_lib` 只复制为当前 common_case_formal_lib 对应的 canonical `<case>_lib.v`；manual 额外导入的共享 `SimpleC.EE.*_lib` 必须复制正式只读源文件，不能误绑定为 `task_local_scratch_lib`。overlay 用具体 case package 的 `-Q` 绑定到 manual 中已有的 `SimpleC.EE...<case>` 逻辑模块名，再按依赖顺序预编译 overlay lib / goal `.vo`。
18	- 脚本必须按 proof group 启动 worker；每个 worker 使用独立 manual copy、独立组内 `worker_helper_scratch_lib`、独立 `rocq-mcp` 配置和 worker-local `_CoqProject`。如果并发 worker 成功启动，就不应主动回退到旧串行模式。
19	- worker 的 `.codex/config.toml` 必须把 `cwd` 指向 group workdir，以便 `rocq-mcp` 使用 worker-local `_CoqProject`；不要在 proving 中手工改 worker `_CoqProject` 或复制 `*_goal.v` / `common_case_formal_lib` / `task_local_scratch_lib` 来补救 loadpath。若 `case_deps/` overlay 缺失、不是只读、未绑定 canonical 逻辑名或未预编译，应视为 prepare 脚本问题，而不是 VC 语义不可证。
20	- 如果 worker 内 `rocq-mcp` 启动或调用失败，但 worker-local `coqc` 可用，这不是 proof blocker，也不是 annotation-bug。worker 必须把失败原因写入 report（例如 binary 缺失、timeout、transport/backend 不可达、exec 模式不支持 MCP tool、`request_user_input is not supported in exec mode`），然后直接使用生成的 `coqc` 命令继续证明当前 worker-local manual。
21	- 在 `coqc` fallback 中，允许通过临时插入 `Show.`, `Show n.`, `Show Existentials.`, `Search`, `Check`, `Print`, `About` 等 Rocq 命令并重新运行 `coqc` / `coqtop` 来观察 proof state；这些调试命令必须在该 witness 标记 solved 或 handoff 前删除。只要最终 worker manual 编译通过、无新增 `Admitted` / `Axiom` / forbidden top-level definition，就可以继续后续 validate / merge / migrate / verify 流水线。
22	- `coqc` 是 worker 和 merge/verify 的编译 gate；看到 `coqc` 不代表禁用了 `rocq-mcp`。但是 worker report 必须保留足够信息，能审计是否存在 `.codex/config.toml`、`use_rocq_mcp=true` 和实际证明策略。若切换到串行 fallback，也必须保留等价的 scratch-local 证明日志 / 报告，说明为什么不能继续使用 worker。
23	- 长时间 `coqc` 应尽量单独计时；必要时使用 `coqc -time` 或在报告中记录慢 theorem / 慢 tactic 的可观测线索。如果只能知道整文件编译耗时，也要如实记录 timing gap。
24	- 在写 proof 之前先判断目标是否可证；不可证的目标必须退回 annotation。
25	- 目标中出现数组或字符串 builtin 谓词时，先读 `.agents/skills/annotation-filling/docs/builtin-array-string-support.md`；优先使用其中列出的 `*Array`、`store_string`、`store_stringLit`、`GlobalStrings` 相关 lemma 和参考 proof，不要为单个 witness 新增重复的基础语义定义。
26	- 不允许引入 `Admitted`、新增 `Axiom` 或通过改变目标来规避证明。
27	- 证明风格要优先模仿 `QCP_demos_LLM` 中已完成的证明。
28	- 只要 symexec 刷新出新的正式 `*_proof_manual.v`，或 `common_case_formal_lib` 已变化，旧 proving scratch 就必须删除并重建。
29	- phase 完成、输入 stale 或主 agent 已正式集成后，proving scratch 和 `.tmp` worker workdir 必须删除。
30

22	Lemma replace_Znth_boundary_local {A: Type} :
23		forall (prefix tail: list A) x y,
24			replace_Znth (Zlength prefix) x (prefix ++ y :: tail) = prefix ++ x :: tail.
25	Proof.
26		induction prefix; intros tail x y.
27		- reflexivity.
28		- simpl.
29		  rewrite Zlength_cons.
30		  pose proof (Zlength_nonneg prefix) as Hlen.
31		  assert (Hpos : Z.succ (Zlength prefix) > 0) by lia.
32		  rewrite (replace_Znth_cons (Z.succ (Zlength prefix)) x a (prefix ++ y :: tail)) by exact Hpos.
33		  replace (Z.succ (Zlength prefix) - 1) with (Zlength prefix) by lia.
34		  simpl.
35		  f_equal.
36		  apply IHprefix.
37	Qed.

39	Lemma replace_Znth_length_local {A: Type}:
40		forall (l: list A) n a,
41			Zlength (replace_Znth n a l) = Zlength l.
42	Proof.
43		intros l n.
44		unfold replace_Znth.
45		remember (Z.to_nat n) as k; clear Heqk.
46		revert k; induction l; intros.
47		- destruct k; simpl; easy.
48		- destruct k; simpl; repeat rewrite Zlength_cons; auto.
49		  rewrite IHl; auto.
50	Qed.

52	Lemma Zlength_sublist_le_local {A: Type}:
53		forall lo hi (l: list A),
54			0 <= lo <= hi ->
55			Zlength (sublist lo hi l) <= hi - lo.
56	Proof.
57		intros lo hi l Hrange.
58		rewrite Zlength_sublist'.
59		destruct (Nat.leb (Z.to_nat hi) (length l)) eqn:Hcmp.
60		- apply Nat.leb_le in Hcmp.
61		  rewrite Nat.min_l by lia.
62		  replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)).
63		  2: {
64			rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
65			rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
66			lia.
67		  }
68		  lia.
69		- apply Nat.leb_gt in Hcmp.
70		  rewrite Nat.min_r by lia.
71		  replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)).
72		  2: {
73			rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
74			rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
75			lia.
76		  }
77		  apply Nat2Z.inj_le.
78		  lia.
79	Qed.

81	Lemma sublist_full_length_inv_local {A: Type}:
82		forall lo hi (l: list A),
83			0 <= lo < hi ->
84			Zlength (sublist lo hi l) = hi - lo ->
85			hi <= Zlength l.
86	Proof.
87		intros lo hi l Hrange Hlen.
88		rewrite Zlength_sublist' in Hlen.
89		replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)) in Hlen.
90		2: {
91		  rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
92		  rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
93		  lia.
94		}
95		apply Nat2Z.inj in Hlen.
96		destruct (Nat.leb (Z.to_nat hi) (length l)) eqn:Hcmp.
97		- apply Nat.leb_le in Hcmp.
98		  rewrite Zlength_correct.
99		  apply Nat2Z.inj_le in Hcmp.
100		  rewrite Z2Nat.id in Hcmp by lia.
101		  exact Hcmp.
102		- apply Nat.leb_gt in Hcmp.
103		  rewrite Nat.min_r in Hlen by lia.
104		  lia.
105	Qed.

112	Lemma proof_of_arr_sum_entail_wit_2 : arr_sum_entail_wit_2.
113	Proof.
114		pre_process.
115		prop_apply UIntArray.full_Zlength.
116		Intros_p Hlen.
117		split_pures.
118		split_pure_spatial.
119		- cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
120		- split_pures.
121		  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H0.
122		  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H1.
123		  + dump_pre_spatial. lia.
124		  + dump_pre_spatial. lia.
125		  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H4.
126		  + dump_pre_spatial.
127		    rewrite H5.
128		    rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i_2 + 1) i_2 l) by lia.
129		    rewrite sum_app.
130		    rewrite (sublist_single 0 i_2 l) by lia.
131		    simpl.
132		    assert (Hrange : forall j : Z, 0 <= j < n_pre -> 0 <= Znth j l 0 < 100) by exact H4.
133		    destruct (Z.eq_dec i_2 0) as [Hi0 | Hi0].
134		    * subst i_2. simpl in *. subst ret.
135		      assert (Hcur : 0 <= Znth 0 l 0 < 100) by (apply Hrange; lia).
136		      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by lia.
137		      replace (Znth 0 l 0 + 0) with (Znth 0 l 0) by lia.
138		      reflexivity.
139		    * assert (Hsublen : i_2 = Z.of_nat (length (sublist 0 i_2 l))) by (rewrite sublist_length; lia).
140		      assert (Hret_bound : 0 <= sum (sublist 0 i_2 l) < i_2 * 100).
141		      {
142		        replace (i_2 * 100) with (Z.of_nat (length (sublist 0 i_2 l)) * 100).
143		        2: { rewrite <- Hsublen. reflexivity. }
144		        apply sum_bound_lt.
145		        - intro Hnil. rewrite Hnil in Hsublen. simpl in Hsublen. lia.
146		        - intros idx Hidx.
147		          rewrite <- Hsublen in Hidx.
148		          rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
149		          apply Hrange.
150		          lia.
151		      }
152		      assert (Hcur : 0 <= Znth i_2 l 0 < 100) by (apply Hrange; lia).
153		      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by lia.
154		      rewrite Z.add_0_r.
155		      reflexivity.
156	Qed.

176	Lemma proof_of_array_copy1_entail_wit_1 : array_copy1_entail_wit_1.
177	Proof.
178		pre_process.
179		sep_apply_l_atomic (IntArray.undef_full_to_undef_seg dest_pre n_pre).
180		change (sublist 0 0 l) with (@nil Z).
181		rewrite (IntArray.seg_empty dest_pre 0 0).

184		  cancel (IntArray.full src_pre n_pre l).

188	Lemma proof_of_array_copy1_entail_wit_2 : array_copy1_entail_wit_2.
189	Proof.
190		pre_process.
191		prop_apply IntArray.full_Zlength.
192		Intros_p Hlen.
193		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_single dest_pre i (Znth i l 0)).
194		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_merge_to_seg dest_pre 0 i (i + 1) (sublist 0 i l) (Znth i l 0 :: nil)).
195		2: { lia. }
196		replace (sublist 0 (i + 1) l) with (sublist 0 i l ++ Znth i l 0 :: nil).
197		2: {
198			rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l) by lia.
199			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l) by lia.
200			reflexivity.
201		}
202		split_pure_spatial.
203		- cancel (IntArray.seg dest_pre 0 (i + 1) (sublist 0 i l ++ Znth i l 0 :: nil)).
204		  cancel (IntArray.full src_pre n_pre l).
205		  cancel (IntArray.undef_seg dest_pre (i + 1) n_pre).
206		- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
207	Qed.

209	Lemma proof_of_array_copy1_return_wit_1 : array_copy1_return_wit_1.
210	Proof.
211		pre_process.
212		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length src_pre).
213		Intros_p Hlen.
214		assert (Hi : i = n_pre) by lia.
215		subst i.
216		assert (HlenZ : Zlength l = n_pre) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l); lia).
217		rewrite (sublist_self l n_pre) by exact (eq_sym HlenZ).
218		rewrite IntArray.undef_seg_empty.
219		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_to_full dest_pre 0 n_pre l).
220		replace (dest_pre + 0 * sizeof ( INT )) with dest_pre by lia.
221		rewrite Z.sub_0_r.
222		cancel (IntArray.full dest_pre n_pre l).
223		cancel (IntArray.full src_pre n_pre l).
224	Qed.

261	Lemma proof_of_array_concat_entail_wit_3 : array_concat_entail_wit_3.
262	Proof.
263		pre_process.
264		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length a_pre).
265		Intros_p Hlen.
266		assert (Hi : i = n_pre) by lia.
267		subst i.
268		assert (Hlen1 : Zlength l1 = n_pre) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l1); lia).

270		change (sublist 0 0 l2) with (@nil Z).

273		split_pure_spatial.

275		  cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
276		  cancel (IntArray.undef_seg ret_pre n_pre (n_pre + m_pre)).
277		  cancel (IntArray.full b_pre m_pre l2).

281	Lemma proof_of_array_concat_entail_wit_4 : array_concat_entail_wit_4.
282	Proof.
283		pre_process.
284		prop_apply (IntArray.full_Zlength b_pre).
285		Intros_p Hlen.
286		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_single ret_pre (n_pre + i) (Znth i l2 0)).
287		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_merge_to_seg ret_pre 0 (n_pre + i) (n_pre + i + 1) (l1 ++ sublist 0 i l2) (Znth i l2 0 :: nil)).
288		2: { lia. }
289		replace (l1 ++ sublist 0 (i + 1) l2) with ((l1 ++ sublist 0 i l2) ++ Znth i l2 0 :: nil).
290		2: {
291			rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l2) by lia.
292			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l2) by lia.
293			rewrite app_assoc.
294			reflexivity.
295		}
296		replace (n_pre + (i + 1)) with (n_pre + i + 1) by lia.
297		split_pure_spatial.
298		- cancel (IntArray.seg ret_pre 0 (n_pre + i + 1) ((l1 ++ sublist 0 i l2) ++ Znth i l2 0 :: nil)).
299		  cancel (IntArray.undef_seg ret_pre (n_pre + i + 1) (n_pre + m_pre)).
300		  cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
301		  cancel (IntArray.full b_pre m_pre l2).
302		- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
303	Qed.

305	Lemma proof_of_array_concat_return_wit_1 : array_concat_return_wit_1.
306	Proof.
307		pre_process.
308		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length a_pre).
309		Intros_p Hlen1.
310		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length b_pre).
311		Intros_p Hlen2.
312		assert (Hi : i = m_pre) by lia.
313		subst i.
314		assert (Hlen2Z : Zlength l2 = m_pre) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l2); lia).
315		rewrite (sublist_self l2 m_pre) by exact (eq_sym Hlen2Z).
316		rewrite IntArray.undef_seg_empty.
317		sep_apply (IntArray.seg_to_full ret_pre 0 (n_pre + m_pre) (l1 ++ l2)).
318		replace (ret_pre + 0 * sizeof ( INT )) with ret_pre by lia.
319		replace (n_pre + m_pre - 0) with (n_pre + m_pre) by lia.
320		cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
321		cancel (IntArray.full b_pre m_pre l2).
322		cancel (IntArray.full ret_pre (n_pre + m_pre) (l1 ++ l2)).
323	Qed.

325	Lemma proof_of_array_swap_entail_wit_1 : array_swap_entail_wit_1.
326	Proof.
327		pre_process.
328		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length a_pre n_pre l1).
329		Intros_p Hlen1raw.
330		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length b_pre n_pre l2).
331		Intros_p Hlen2raw.
332		assert (Hlen1 : Zlength l1 = n_pre) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l1); lia).
333		assert (Hlen2 : Zlength l2 = n_pre) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l2); lia).
334		change (sublist 0 0 l2) with (@nil Z).
335		change (sublist 0 0 l1) with (@nil Z).
336		rewrite (sublist_self l1 n_pre) by exact (eq_sym Hlen1).
337		rewrite (sublist_self l2 n_pre) by exact (eq_sym Hlen2).
338		simpl.
339		split_pure_spatial.
340		- cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
341		  cancel (IntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).
342		- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
343	Qed.

345	Lemma proof_of_array_swap_entail_wit_2 : array_swap_entail_wit_2.
346	Proof.
347		pre_process.
348		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length a_pre n_pre
349			(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
350				(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1))).
351		Intros_p HlenA_raw.
352		prop_apply (IntArray.full_length b_pre n_pre
353			(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
354				(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2))).
355		Intros_p HlenB_raw.
356		assert (HbaseA : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) = n_pre).
357		{
358			pose proof (Zlength_correct
359				(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
360					(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1))) as Hz.
361			rewrite replace_Znth_length_local in Hz.
362			lia.
363		}
364		assert (HbaseB : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) = n_pre).
365		{
366			pose proof (Zlength_correct
367				(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
368					(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2))) as Hz.
369			rewrite replace_Znth_length_local in Hz.
370			lia.
371		}
372		pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local 0 i l1 ltac:(lia)) as Hpre1_le0.
373		pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local 0 i l2 ltac:(lia)) as Hpre2_le0.
374		pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local i n_pre l1 ltac:(lia)) as Hsuf1_le.
375		pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local i n_pre l2 ltac:(lia)) as Hsuf2_le.
376		assert (Hpre1_le : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1) <= i) by lia.
377		assert (Hpre2_le : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2) <= i) by lia.
378		assert (Hsuf1_eq : Zlength (sublist i n_pre l1) = n_pre - i).
379		{
380			rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseA.
381			lia.
382		}
383		assert (Hsuf2_eq : Zlength (sublist i n_pre l2) = n_pre - i).
384		{
385			rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseB.
386			lia.
387		}
388		assert (Hpre1_eq : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1) = i).
389		{
390			rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseB.
391			lia.
392		}
393		assert (Hpre2_eq : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2) = i).
394		{
395			rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseA.
396			lia.
397		}
398		assert (Hlen1z : n_pre <= Zlength l1) by (eapply sublist_full_length_inv_local; eauto; lia).
399		assert (Hlen2z : n_pre <= Zlength l2) by (eapply sublist_full_length_inv_local; eauto; lia).
400		assert (Hlen1 : n_pre <= Z.of_nat (length l1)) by (rewrite <- Zlength_correct; exact Hlen1z).
401		assert (Hlen2 : n_pre <= Z.of_nat (length l2)) by (rewrite <- Zlength_correct; exact Hlen2z).
402		assert (Ha :
403			replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
404				(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) =
405			(sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
406		{
407			rewrite (sublist_split i n_pre (i + 1) l1).
408			2: { lia. }
409			2: { lia. }
410			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l1) by lia.
411			assert (Hz : Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0 = Znth i l2 0).
412			{
413				assert (Hi_pre1 : i >= Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) by lia.
414				rewrite app_Znth2 by exact Hi_pre1.
415				replace (i - Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) with 0 by lia.
416				rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
417				f_equal; lia.
418			}
419			rewrite Hz.
420			replace (sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)
421				with (sublist 0 i l2 ++ Znth i l2 0 :: sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1).
422			2: {
423				rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l2).
424				2: { lia. }
425				2: { lia. }
426				rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l2) by lia.
427				rewrite <- (app_assoc (sublist 0 i l2) (Znth i l2 0 :: nil) (sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
428				simpl.
429				reflexivity.
430			}
431			simpl.
432			replace i with (Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) at 1 by exact Hpre2_eq.
433			apply replace_Znth_boundary_local.
434		}
435		assert (Hb :
436			replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
437				(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) =
438			(sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
439		{
440			rewrite (sublist_split i n_pre (i + 1) l2).
441			2: { lia. }
442			2: { lia. }
443			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l2) by lia.
444			assert (Hz : Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0 = Znth i l1 0).
445			{
446				assert (Hi_pre2 : i >= Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) by lia.
447				rewrite app_Znth2 by exact Hi_pre2.
448				replace (i - Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) with 0 by lia.
449				rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
450				f_equal; lia.
451			}
452			rewrite Hz.
453			replace (sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)
454				with (sublist 0 i l1 ++ Znth i l1 0 :: sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2).
455			2: {
456				rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l1).
457				2: { lia. }
458				2: { lia. }
459				rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l1) by lia.
460				rewrite <- (app_assoc (sublist 0 i l1) (Znth i l1 0 :: nil) (sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
461				simpl.
462				reflexivity.
463			}
464			simpl.
465			replace i with (Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) at 1 by exact Hpre1_eq.
466			apply replace_Znth_boundary_local.
467		}
468		rewrite Ha.
469		rewrite Hb.
470		split_pure_spatial.
471		- cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre (sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
472		  cancel (IntArray.full b_pre n_pre (sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
473		- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
474	Qed.

487		cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l2).
488		cancel (IntArray.full b_pre n_pre l1).
489	Qed.

518		sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_merge_to_seg ret_pre 0 i (i + 1) l3_2 (unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil)).
519		2: { lia. }

522		  cancel (UIntArray.undef_seg ret_pre (i + 1) n_pre).
523		  cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
524		  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).

527		  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
528		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H2.
529		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H3.
530		  + dump_pre_spatial.
531		  	rewrite Zlength_app, Zlength_cons, Zlength_nil.
532		    lia.

534		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H6.
535		  + dump_pre_spatial. intros k Hk.
536		    destruct (Z_lt_ge_dec k i).
537		    * rewrite app_Znth1 by lia.
538		      apply H7.
539		      lia.
540		    * assert (k = i) by lia.
541		      subst k.
542		      rewrite app_Znth2 by lia.
543		      rewrite H4.
544		      rewrite Z.sub_diag.
545		      simpl.
546		      assert (Hsum : 0 <= Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0 < two_power_nat 32).

551				lia.
552		      }
553		      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by exact Hsum.
554		      reflexivity.
555	Qed.

687		        specialize (H7 Hi_pos);

783	Lemma proof_of_array_to_list_entail_wit_1 : array_to_list_entail_wit_1.
784	Proof.
785		pre_process.
786		Exists (Znth 0 l 0).
787		rewrite H0.
788		change (sublist 0 (1 - 1) l) with (@nil Z).
789		simpl.
790		split_pure_spatial.
791		- cancel (&( retval # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> Znth 0 l 0).
792		  cancel (&( retval # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> 0).
793		  cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
794		- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
795	Qed.

797	Lemma proof_of_array_to_list_entail_wit_2 : array_to_list_entail_wit_2.
798	Proof.
799		pre_process.
800		prop_apply IntArray.full_Zlength.
801		Intros_p Hlen.
802		Exists (Znth i l 0).
803		split_pure_spatial.
804		- rewrite H0.
805		  cancel (&( retval # "list" ->ₛ "data") # Int |-> Znth i l 0).
806		  cancel (&( retval # "list" ->ₛ "next") # Ptr |-> 0).
807		  sep_apply (sllseg_len1 tail v_2 retval).
808		  2: { easy. }
809		  sep_apply (sllseg_sllseg head tail retval (sublist 0 (i - 1) l) (v_2 :: nil)).
810		  assert (Hsubl : sublist 0 (i + 1 - 1) l = sublist 0 (i - 1) l ++ v_2 :: nil).
811		  {
812			subst v_2.
813			assert (Hsingle : sublist (i - 1) i l = (Znth (i - 1) l 0 :: nil)%list).
814			{
815			  replace i with ((i - 1) + 1) by lia.
816			  replace (((i - 1) + 1) - 1) with (i - 1) by lia.
817			  apply sublist_single.
818			  lia.
819			}
820			replace (i + 1 - 1) with i by lia.
821			rewrite (sublist_split 0 i (i - 1) l) by lia.
822			rewrite Hsingle.
823			reflexivity.
824		  }
825		  rewrite <- Hsubl.
826		  cancel (sllseg head retval (sublist 0 (i + 1 - 1) l)).
827		  cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
828		- split_pures.
829		  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
830		  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
831		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H4.
832		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H.
833		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H6.
834		  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H7.
835		  + dump_pre_spatial; replace (i + 1 - 1) with i by lia.
836		    reflexivity.
837	Qed.
838	
839	Lemma proof_of_array_to_list_return_wit_1 : array_to_list_return_wit_1.
840	Proof.
841		pre_process.
842		prop_apply IntArray.full_length.
843		Intros_p Hlen.
844		assert (Hlen0 : Zlength l = 0) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l); lia).
845		apply Zlength_nil_inv in Hlen0.
846		subst l.
847		simpl.
848		split_pure_spatial.
849		- cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre nil).
850		- dump_pre_spatial.
851		  unfold NULL.
852		  lia.
853	Qed.
854	
855	Lemma proof_of_array_to_list_return_wit_2 : array_to_list_return_wit_2.
856	Proof.
857		pre_process.
858		prop_apply IntArray.full_Zlength.
859		Intros_p Hlen.
860		assert (Hi : i = n_pre) by lia.
861		subst i.
862		sep_apply (sllseg_len1 tail v 0).
863		2: { easy. }
864		sep_apply sllseg_0_sll.
865		sep_apply (sllseg_sll head tail (sublist 0 (n_pre - 1) l) (v :: nil)).
866		replace (sublist 0 (n_pre - 1) l ++ v :: nil) with l.
867		2: {
868		  subst v.
869		  rewrite <- (sublist_self l n_pre) at 1 by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l); lia).
870		  rewrite (sublist_split 0 n_pre (n_pre - 1) l) by lia.
871		  replace n_pre with ((n_pre - 1) + 1) in * by lia.
872		  replace (n_pre - 1 + 1 - 1) with (n_pre - 1) by lia.
873		  rewrite (sublist_single 0 (n_pre - 1) l) by (pose proof (Zlength_correct l); lia).
874		  reflexivity.
875		}
876		cancel (sll head l).
877		cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
878	Qed.

Require Import Coq.ZArith.ZArith.
Require Import Coq.Bool.Bool.
Require Import Coq.Strings.String.
Require Import Coq.Lists.List.
Require Import Coq.Classes.RelationClasses.
Require Import Coq.Classes.Morphisms.
Require Import Coq.micromega.Psatz.
Require Import Coq.Sorting.Permutation.
From AUXLib Require Import int_auto Axioms Feq Idents ListLib VMap.
Require Import SetsClass.SetsClass. Import SetsNotation.
From SimpleC.SL Require Import Mem SeparationLogic.
From SimpleC.EE.QCP_demos_LLM Require Import array_cases_goal.
Require Import Logic.LogicGenerator.demo932.Interface.
Local Open Scope Z_scope.
Local Open Scope sets.
Local Open Scope string.
Local Open Scope list.
Import naive_C_Rules.
Require Import SimpleC.EE.QCP_demos_LLM.sll_lib.
Local Open Scope sac.

Lemma replace_Znth_boundary_local {A: Type} :
	forall (prefix tail: list A) x y,
		replace_Znth (Zlength prefix) x (prefix ++ y :: tail) = prefix ++ x :: tail.
Proof.
	induction prefix; intros tail x y.
	- reflexivity.
	- simpl.
	  rewrite Zlength_cons.
	  pose proof (Zlength_nonneg prefix) as Hlen.
	  assert (Hpos : Z.succ (Zlength prefix) > 0) by lia.
	  rewrite (replace_Znth_cons (Z.succ (Zlength prefix)) x a (prefix ++ y :: tail)) by exact Hpos.
	  replace (Z.succ (Zlength prefix) - 1) with (Zlength prefix) by lia.
	  simpl.
	  f_equal.
	  apply IHprefix.
Qed.

Lemma replace_Znth_length_local {A: Type}:
	forall (l: list A) n a,
		Zlength (replace_Znth n a l) = Zlength l.
Proof.
	intros l n.
	unfold replace_Znth.
	remember (Z.to_nat n) as k; clear Heqk.
	revert k; induction l; intros.
	- destruct k; simpl; easy.
	- destruct k; simpl; repeat rewrite Zlength_cons; auto.
	  rewrite IHl; auto.
Qed.

Lemma Zlength_sublist_le_local {A: Type}:
	forall lo hi (l: list A),
		0 <= lo <= hi ->
		Zlength (sublist lo hi l) <= hi - lo.
Proof.
	intros lo hi l Hrange.
	rewrite Zlength_sublist'.
	destruct (Nat.leb (Z.to_nat hi) (length l)) eqn:Hcmp.
	- apply Nat.leb_le in Hcmp.
	  rewrite Nat.min_l by lia.
	  replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)).
	  2: {
		rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
		rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
		lia.
	  }
	  lia.
	- apply Nat.leb_gt in Hcmp.
	  rewrite Nat.min_r by lia.
	  replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)).
	  2: {
		rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
		rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
		lia.
	  }
	  apply Nat2Z.inj_le.
	  lia.
Qed.

Lemma sublist_full_length_inv_local {A: Type}:
	forall lo hi (l: list A),
		0 <= lo < hi ->
		Zlength (sublist lo hi l) = hi - lo ->
		hi <= Zlength l.
Proof.
	intros lo hi l Hrange Hlen.
	rewrite Zlength_sublist' in Hlen.
	replace (hi - lo) with (Z.of_nat (Z.to_nat hi - Z.to_nat lo)) in Hlen.
	2: {
	  rewrite Nat2Z.inj_sub by lia.
	  rewrite !Z2Nat.id by lia.
	  lia.
	}
	apply Nat2Z.inj in Hlen.
	destruct (Nat.leb (Z.to_nat hi) (length l)) eqn:Hcmp.
	- apply Nat.leb_le in Hcmp.
	  rewrite Zlength_correct.
	  apply Nat2Z.inj_le in Hcmp.
	  rewrite Z2Nat.id in Hcmp by lia.
	  exact Hcmp.
	- apply Nat.leb_gt in Hcmp.
	  rewrite Nat.min_r in Hlen by lia.
	  lia.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_arr_sum_entail_wit_2 : arr_sum_entail_wit_2.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	prop_apply UIntArray.full_Zlength.
	Intros_p Hlen.
	split_pures.
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
	- split_pures.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H0.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H1.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. exact H4.
	  + dump_pre_spatial.
	    rewrite H5.
	    rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i_2 + 1) i_2 l) by lia.
	    rewrite sum_app.
	    rewrite (sublist_single 0 i_2 l) by lia.
	    simpl.
	    assert (Hrange : forall j : Z, 0 <= j < n_pre -> 0 <= Znth j l 0 < 100) by exact H4.
	    destruct (Z.eq_dec i_2 0) as [Hi0 | Hi0].
	    * subst i_2. simpl in *. subst ret.
	      assert (Hcur : 0 <= Znth 0 l 0 < 100) by (apply Hrange; lia).
	      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by lia.
	      replace (Znth 0 l 0 + 0) with (Znth 0 l 0) by lia.
	      reflexivity.
	    * assert (Hsublen : i_2 = Z.of_nat (length (sublist 0 i_2 l))) by (rewrite sublist_length; lia).
	      assert (Hret_bound : 0 <= sum (sublist 0 i_2 l) < i_2 * 100).
	      {
	        replace (i_2 * 100) with (Z.of_nat (length (sublist 0 i_2 l)) * 100).
	        2: { rewrite <- Hsublen. reflexivity. }
	        apply sum_bound_lt.
	        - intro Hnil. rewrite Hnil in Hsublen. simpl in Hsublen. lia.
	        - intros idx Hidx.
	          rewrite <- Hsublen in Hidx.
	          rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
	          apply Hrange.
	          lia.
	      }
	      assert (Hcur : 0 <= Znth i_2 l 0 < 100) by (apply Hrange; lia).
	      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by lia.
	      rewrite Z.add_0_r.
	      reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_array_swap_entail_wit_1 : array_swap_entail_wit_1.

Lemma proof_of_array_swap_entail_wit_2 : array_swap_entail_wit_2.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	prop_apply (IntArray.full_length a_pre n_pre
		(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
			(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1))).
	Intros_p HlenA_raw.
	prop_apply (IntArray.full_length b_pre n_pre
		(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
			(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2))).
	Intros_p HlenB_raw.
	assert (HbaseA : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) = n_pre).
	{
		pose proof (Zlength_correct
			(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
				(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1))) as Hz.
		rewrite replace_Znth_length_local in Hz.
		lia.
	}
	assert (HbaseB : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) = n_pre).
	{
		pose proof (Zlength_correct
			(replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
				(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2))) as Hz.
		rewrite replace_Znth_length_local in Hz.
		lia.
	}
	pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local 0 i l1 ltac:(lia)) as Hpre1_le0.
	pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local 0 i l2 ltac:(lia)) as Hpre2_le0.
	pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local i n_pre l1 ltac:(lia)) as Hsuf1_le.
	pose proof (Zlength_sublist_le_local i n_pre l2 ltac:(lia)) as Hsuf2_le.
	assert (Hpre1_le : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1) <= i) by lia.
	assert (Hpre2_le : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2) <= i) by lia.
	assert (Hsuf1_eq : Zlength (sublist i n_pre l1) = n_pre - i).
	{
		rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseA.
		lia.
	}
	assert (Hsuf2_eq : Zlength (sublist i n_pre l2) = n_pre - i).
	{
		rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseB.
		lia.
	}
	assert (Hpre1_eq : Zlength (sublist 0 i l1) = i).
	{
		rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseB.
		lia.
	}
	assert (Hpre2_eq : Zlength (sublist 0 i l2) = i).
	{
		rewrite Zlength_app in HbaseA.
		lia.
	}
	assert (Hlen1z : n_pre <= Zlength l1) by (eapply sublist_full_length_inv_local; eauto; lia).
	assert (Hlen2z : n_pre <= Zlength l2) by (eapply sublist_full_length_inv_local; eauto; lia).
	assert (Hlen1 : n_pre <= Z.of_nat (length l1)) by (rewrite <- Zlength_correct; exact Hlen1z).
	assert (Hlen2 : n_pre <= Z.of_nat (length l2)) by (rewrite <- Zlength_correct; exact Hlen2z).
	assert (Ha :
		replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0)
			(sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) =
		(sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
	{
		rewrite (sublist_split i n_pre (i + 1) l1).
		2: { lia. }
		2: { lia. }
		rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l1) by lia.
		assert (Hz : Znth i (sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) 0 = Znth i l2 0).
		{
			assert (Hi_pre1 : i >= Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) by lia.
			rewrite app_Znth2 by exact Hi_pre1.
			replace (i - Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) with 0 by lia.
			rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
			f_equal; lia.
		}
		rewrite Hz.
		replace (sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)
			with (sublist 0 i l2 ++ Znth i l2 0 :: sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1).
		2: {
			rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l2).
			2: { lia. }
			2: { lia. }
			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l2) by lia.
			rewrite <- (app_assoc (sublist 0 i l2) (Znth i l2 0 :: nil) (sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
			simpl.
			reflexivity.
		}
		simpl.
		replace i with (Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) at 1 by exact Hpre2_eq.
		apply replace_Znth_boundary_local.
	}
	assert (Hb :
		replace_Znth i (Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0)
			(sublist 0 i l1 ++ sublist i n_pre l2) =
		(sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
	{
		rewrite (sublist_split i n_pre (i + 1) l2).
		2: { lia. }
		2: { lia. }
		rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l2) by lia.
		assert (Hz : Znth i (sublist 0 i l2 ++ sublist i n_pre l1) 0 = Znth i l1 0).
		{
			assert (Hi_pre2 : i >= Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) by lia.
			rewrite app_Znth2 by exact Hi_pre2.
			replace (i - Zlength (sublist 0 i l2)) with 0 by lia.
			rewrite Znth_sublist_lt by lia.
			f_equal; lia.
		}
		rewrite Hz.
		replace (sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)
			with (sublist 0 i l1 ++ Znth i l1 0 :: sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2).
		2: {
			rewrite (sublist_split 0 (i + 1) i l1).
			2: { lia. }
			2: { lia. }
			rewrite (sublist_single 0 i l1) by lia.
			rewrite <- (app_assoc (sublist 0 i l1) (Znth i l1 0 :: nil) (sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
			simpl.
			reflexivity.
		}
		simpl.
		replace i with (Zlength (sublist 0 i l1)) at 1 by exact Hpre1_eq.
		apply replace_Znth_boundary_local.
	}
	rewrite Ha.
	rewrite Hb.
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre (sublist 0 (i + 1) l2 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l1)).
	  cancel (IntArray.full b_pre n_pre (sublist 0 (i + 1) l1 ++ sublist (i + 1) n_pre l2)).
	- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial; lia.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_array_swap_return_wit_1 : array_swap_return_wit_1.

	pre_process.

Lemma proof_of_array_vector_sum_entail_wit_1 : array_vector_sum_entail_wit_1.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	Exists (@nil Z).
	sep_apply_l_atomic (UIntArray.undef_full_to_undef_seg ret_pre n_pre).

	  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).

	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; reflexivity.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H1.

	  + dump_pre_spatial; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_array_vector_sum_entail_wit_2 : array_vector_sum_entail_wit_2.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	Exists (l3_2 ++ unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil).
	sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_single ret_pre i (unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0) 32)).
	sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_merge_to_seg ret_pre 0 i (i + 1) l3_2 (unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil)).
	2: { lia. }
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (UIntArray.seg ret_pre 0 (i + 1) (l3_2 ++ unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil)).
	  cancel (UIntArray.undef_seg ret_pre (i + 1) n_pre).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).
	- split_pures.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H2.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H3.
	  + dump_pre_spatial.
	  	rewrite Zlength_app, Zlength_cons, Zlength_nil.
	    lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H5.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H6.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. intros k Hk.
	    destruct (Z_lt_ge_dec k i).
	    * rewrite app_Znth1 by lia.
	      apply H7.
	      lia.
	    * assert (k = i) by lia.
	      subst k.
	      rewrite app_Znth2 by lia.
	      rewrite H4.
	      rewrite Z.sub_diag.
	      simpl.
	      assert (Hsum : 0 <= Znth i l1 0 + Znth i l2 0 < two_power_nat 32).
	      {
			destruct (H5 i) as [Ha1 Ha2]; try lia.
			destruct (H6 i) as [Hb1 Hb2]; try lia.
			change (two_power_nat 32) with 4294967296.
			lia.
	      }
	      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by exact Hsum.
	      reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_array_vector_sum_return_wit_1 : array_vector_sum_return_wit_1.

	pre_process.

	replace (ret_pre + 0 * sizeof ( UINT )) with ret_pre by lia.

	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full ret_pre n_pre l3_2).
	- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial.
	  + exact H4.
	  + exact H7.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_pointwise_mul_entail_wit_1 : pointwise_mul_entail_wit_1.

Lemma proof_of_pointwise_mul_entail_wit_2 : pointwise_mul_entail_wit_2.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	Exists (l3_2 ++ unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 * Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil).
	sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_single c_pre i (unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 * Znth i l2 0) 32)).
	sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_merge_to_seg c_pre 0 i (i + 1) l3_2 (unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 * Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil)).
	2: { lia. }
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (UIntArray.seg c_pre 0 (i + 1) (l3_2 ++ unsigned_last_nbits (Znth i l1 0 * Znth i l2 0) 32 :: nil)).
	  cancel (UIntArray.undef_seg c_pre (i + 1) n_pre).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).
	- split_pures.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H2.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H3.
	  + dump_pre_spatial.
	  	rewrite Zlength_app, Zlength_cons, Zlength_nil.
	    lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H5.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H6.
	  + dump_pre_spatial. intros k Hk.
	    destruct (Z_lt_ge_dec k i).
	    * rewrite app_Znth1 by lia.
	      apply H7.
	      lia.
	    * assert (k = i) by lia.
	      subst k.
	      rewrite app_Znth2 by lia.
	      rewrite H4.
	      rewrite Z.sub_diag.
	      simpl.
	      assert (Hmul : 0 <= Znth i l1 0 * Znth i l2 0 < two_power_nat 32).
	      {
			destruct (H5 i) as [Ha1 Ha2]; try lia.
			destruct (H6 i) as [Hb1 Hb2]; try lia.
			change (two_power_nat 32) with 4294967296.
			nia.
	      }
	      rewrite unsigned_last_nbits_eq by exact Hmul.
	      reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_pointwise_mul_return_wit_1 : pointwise_mul_return_wit_1.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	Exists l3_2.
	assert (Hi : i_2 = n_pre) by lia.
	rewrite Hi in *.
	rewrite UIntArray.undef_seg_empty.
	sep_apply (UIntArray.seg_to_full c_pre 0 n_pre l3_2).
	replace (c_pre + 0 * sizeof ( UINT )) with c_pre by lia.
	replace (n_pre - 0) with n_pre by lia.
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (UIntArray.full a_pre n_pre l1).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full b_pre n_pre l2).
	  cancel (UIntArray.full c_pre n_pre l3_2).
	- split_pures; dump_pre_spatial.
	  + exact H4.
	  + exact H7.
Qed.

Lemma proof_of_array_max_entail_wit_2_1 : array_max_entail_wit_2_1.
Proof.
	pre_process.
	split_pure_spatial.
	- cancel (IntArray.full a_pre n_pre l).
	- split_pures.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; lia.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H3.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H4.
	  + dump_pre_spatial; exact H5.
	  + dump_pre_spatial.
	    intros Hi1.

	    split; [split; [lia | reflexivity]|
	      intros k3 Hk3;
	      destruct (Z.eq_dec k3 i) as [Hki | Hki];
	      [subst k3; lia |
	       assert (k3 < i) by lia;
	       destruct (Z.eq_dec i 0) as [Hi0 | Hi0];
	       [subst i; lia |
	        assert (Hi_pos : 0 < i) by lia;
	        specialize (H7 Hi_pos);
